## Meeting Purpose

[Follow-up discussion to finalize engagement terms between N-Able and GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/ke4YQ4YJ-iooySfKd3ZUB9uoEWNzyszm?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [N-Able agrees to a 6-month engagement at $12K/month + $20K strategy sprint](https://fathom.video/share/ke4YQ4YJ-iooySfKd3ZUB9uoEWNzyszm?tab=summary&timestamp=43.0)
  - [Tentative start date set for September 8th, 2025](https://fathom.video/share/ke4YQ4YJ-iooySfKd3ZUB9uoEWNzyszm?tab=summary&timestamp=825.0)
  - [N-Able's procurement process typically takes 4-6 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/ke4YQ4YJ-iooySfKd3ZUB9uoEWNzyszm?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)
  - [Internal processes at N-Able may pose challenges for content review/approval](https://fathom.video/share/ke4YQ4YJ-iooySfKd3ZUB9uoEWNzyszm?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

## Topics

### Engagement Terms

  - [N-Able opts for a smaller 6-month package due to budget constraints](https://fathom.video/share/ke4YQ4YJ-iooySfKd3ZUB9uoEWNzyszm?tab=summary&timestamp=43.0)
  - [Total engagement: 8 months (2-month strategy sprint + 6-month execution)](https://fathom.video/share/ke4YQ4YJ-iooySfKd3ZUB9uoEWNzyszm?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)
  - [Pricing: $12K/month for execution phase + $20K for strategy sprint](https://fathom.video/share/ke4YQ4YJ-iooySfKd3ZUB9uoEWNzyszm?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
  - [Kyle emphasizes this structure balances value delivery and deal feasibility](https://fathom.video/share/ke4YQ4YJ-iooySfKd3ZUB9uoEWNzyszm?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)

### Procurement Process

  - [N-Able's standard procurement cycle: 4-6 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/ke4YQ4YJ-iooySfKd3ZUB9uoEWNzyszm?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)
  - [Steps include vendor onboarding form and compliance review](https://fathom.video/share/ke4YQ4YJ-iooySfKd3ZUB9uoEWNzyszm?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)
  - [Potential accelerated process as GrowthX doesn't handle personal data](https://fathom.video/share/ke4YQ4YJ-iooySfKd3ZUB9uoEWNzyszm?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)
  - [AI usage by GrowthX (not N-Able) may simplify compliance requirements](https://fathom.video/share/ke4YQ4YJ-iooySfKd3ZUB9uoEWNzyszm?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)

### Internal Challenges

  - [Andrew expresses concern about N-Able's internal processes for legal review and content publication](https://fathom.video/share/ke4YQ4YJ-iooySfKd3ZUB9uoEWNzyszm?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Identifies internal processes as potential bottleneck, not GrowthX's delivery](https://fathom.video/share/ke4YQ4YJ-iooySfKd3ZUB9uoEWNzyszm?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
  - [Kyle offers to adapt based on learnings from the strategy sprint phase](https://fathom.video/share/ke4YQ4YJ-iooySfKd3ZUB9uoEWNzyszm?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
  - [GrowthX has experience with strict review processes (e.g., doctor review for medical content)](https://fathom.video/share/ke4YQ4YJ-iooySfKd3ZUB9uoEWNzyszm?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### Communication Channels

  - [GrowthX prefers Slack for collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/ke4YQ4YJ-iooySfKd3ZUB9uoEWNzyszm?tab=summary&timestamp=748.0)
  - [N-Able currently uses Teams, not Slack](https://fathom.video/share/ke4YQ4YJ-iooySfKd3ZUB9uoEWNzyszm?tab=summary&timestamp=769.0)
  - [Agreement to address this closer to engagement start](https://fathom.video/share/ke4YQ4YJ-iooySfKd3ZUB9uoEWNzyszm?tab=summary&timestamp=776.0)

### Start Date and Flexibility

  - [Tentative start date: September 8th, 2025](https://fathom.video/share/ke4YQ4YJ-iooySfKd3ZUB9uoEWNzyszm?tab=summary&timestamp=825.0)
  - [GrowthX limits to two kickoffs per week but offers flexibility if needed](https://fathom.video/share/ke4YQ4YJ-iooySfKd3ZUB9uoEWNzyszm?tab=summary&timestamp=862.0)

## Next Steps

  - GrowthX to send statement of work to N-Able
  - N-Able to initiate vendor onboarding process
  - Both parties to aim for September 8th, 2025 start date
  - Address communication channel preferences (Slack vs. Teams) closer to engagement start
  - [N-Able to work on streamlining internal review processes for content approval](https://fathom.video/share/ke4YQ4YJ-iooySfKd3ZUB9uoEWNzyszm?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
